title: ReGhostJump
description: when you right click at and open a coffin from Graveyard, there is a 7% chance that a reaper will spawn on it.
body:
[GhostJump](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ghostjump) mod is now updated for Minecraft 1.20.1!

## **Features:**
1. **Tombstone Interaction**: Right-clicking a SarcophagusBlock has a chance to spawn pre-configured entities near the tombstone.
2. **Custom Entities**: Configure the types of entities to be summoned via the config file, default is "graveyard:reaper".
3. **Summoning Chance Configuration**: Set the chance of triggering the summon via the config file, default is 7%.

## **Configuration Options:**
- **Chance**: The chance to trigger entity summoning, ranging from 1 to 100, default is 7.
- **SummonedEntities**: List of entities to be summoned, default is ["graveyard:reaper"].

Experience the new tombstone interaction feature and add a touch of surprise to your game!
